label: PASS
rationale: PASS: ComID 1 was updated, but the target queries ComID 2 with no supplied changes. HostProperties are enforced per ComID, so ComID 2 remains at initial/default values and the response is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: FAIL: The target queries ComID 2 after only ComID 1 was updated, but returns ComID 1 values. HostProperties are per-ComID, so ComID 2 should remain at initial/default values.

label: PASS
rationale: PASS: ComID 2 was updated, but the target queries ComID 1 with no supplied changes. Per-ComID state means ComID 1 remains at initial/default values, matching the response.

label: FAIL
rationale: FAIL: The target queries ComID 1 after only ComID 2 was updated, but returns ComID 2 values. HostProperties from one ComID must not apply to another ComID.

label: PASS
rationale: PASS: The second Properties call is on the same ComID and supplies only MaxPackets. Omitted properties must not change, so the cumulative response preserving MaxComPacketSize and MaxPacketSize while updating MaxPackets is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: FAIL: The same ComID previously had MaxComPacketSize and MaxPacketSize set, and the target supplies only MaxPackets. Omitted properties should retain current values, not revert to defaults.

label: PASS
rationale: PASS: The target updates ComID 2 with MaxPackets only. Since prior changes were on ComID 1, ComID 2 should keep defaults for omitted properties and use MaxPackets=6, matching the response.

label: FAIL
rationale: FAIL: The target updates ComID 2 with MaxPackets only but returns MaxComPacketSize and MaxPacketSize values learned on ComID 1. Per-ComID rules require ComID 2 omitted properties to remain at defaults.

label: PASS
rationale: PASS: ProtocolStackReset for ComID 1 resets communications properties only for that ComID. The target query on ComID 1 returns initial/default HostProperties, so it is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: FAIL: ProtocolStackReset for ComID 1 should reset ComID 1 HostProperties to initial/default assumptions, but the target returns the old ComID 1 values.

label: PASS
rationale: PASS: ProtocolStackReset was for ComID 1 only. ComID 2 should retain its previously submitted HostProperties, and the target query on ComID 2 does so.

rationale: FAIL: ProtocolStackReset for ComID 1 should not reset ComID 2. The target query on ComID 2 incorrectly returns initial/default values instead of its current submitted values.

rationale: PASS: PowerCycle resets the TPer knowledge of host communications capabilities on all ComIDs to initial/default assumptions. The target query on ComID 2 returns defaults.

rationale: FAIL: PowerCycle resets HostProperties knowledge on all ComIDs, but the target query on ComID 2 returns the pre-reset values.
